name: v0_local_run
llm: claude-code (Claude Opus, acting as agent LLM)
notes: First test run. Claude Code generates agent responses manually based on personas and environment state. 10 rounds covering Apr 1841 — Oct 1842. Testing whether v0 loop produces coherent narrative and plausible character arcs.
historical_baseline: Hawthorne left ~Nov 1842 (after 18 months). Brook Farm survived until 1847. Key tensions: intellectuals vs laborers, money problems, Fourier conversion (1844), phalanstery fire (1846).
